nasb.text: Behold, you are to them like a sensual song by one who has a beautiful voice and plays well on an instrument; for they hear your words but they do not practice them.

esv.text: And behold, you are to them like one who sings lustful songs with a beautiful voice and plays well on an instrument, for they hear what you say, but they will not do it.

cnv.text: 在他們眼中，你不過是首情歌，唱得美妙，彈得悅耳，他們聽了你的話，卻不去行。

ccb.text: 他们只听不做，你在他们眼中只不过是善唱情歌、长于弹奏乐器的人。
